activities_projects.title: Comparative Study of Federal Countries
activities_projects.objective: Analyse similarities and differences between federal systems
steps: Select two federal countries such as India and USA
Compare their power-sharing arrangements
Write a report explaining how historical contexts influenced their federal systems
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Develops comparative analytical skills about federal structures
activities_projects.evaluation: Depth of analysis and examples (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Case Study on Centre–State Conflict
steps: Identify a real or hypothetical conflict between Union and State government
Explain which constitutional provisions apply
Describe the role of the judiciary in resolving the conflict
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands constitutional mechanisms for dispute resolution

activities_projects.title: Language Policy Critical Review
steps: Explain why Hindi was adopted as the official language
Analyse the role of English in administration
Evaluate how language policy helped maintain unity in diversity
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Develops critical understanding of linguistic policy
activities_projects.evaluation: Critical analysis and argument strength (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Federalism Debate
activities_projects.objective: Critically evaluate the benefits and challenges of federalism
steps: Prepare arguments supporting federalism
Prepare arguments criticising federalism
Conduct a classroom debate and summarise the conclusions
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Enhances critical thinking and debate skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of arguments and participation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Decentralisation Policy Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Evaluate the impact of decentralisation in India
steps: Explain the 73rd and 74th Constitutional Amendments
Analyse how these amendments strengthened local governance
Identify challenges faced by local governments
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the political importance of decentralisation

activities_projects.title: Role of Regional Parties Research
activities_projects.objective: Analyse how regional parties strengthened federalism
steps: Identify two regional political parties in India
Explain their influence on national politics
Discuss how coalition governments changed Centre–State relations
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the political dynamics influencing federalism
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of research and explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Linguistic Diversity Data Analysis
steps: Use the data on scheduled languages
Create a bar graph showing proportion of speakers
Interpret what the data reveals about India's linguistic diversity
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Develops data interpretation skills related to social diversity
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy of graph and interpretation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Local Governance Case Study
activities_projects.objective: Evaluate effectiveness of Panchayati Raj institutions
steps: Interview a local leader or gather information about your panchayat/municipality
Identify key development projects carried out
Evaluate how decentralisation improved governance
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Applies theoretical knowledge to real-life governance
activities_projects.evaluation: Depth of case study and evaluation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Constitutional Amendment Investigation
activities_projects.objective: Understand constitutional procedures in federal systems
steps: Study the process of constitutional amendment in India
Explain why federal provisions require approval from states
Analyse how this protects the federal structure

activities_projects.title: Federalism in Practice Essay
activities_projects.objective: Evaluate how federalism operates in modern India
steps: Explain the key features of federalism
Analyse how democratic politics strengthened federalism after 1990
Provide examples supporting your explanation
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Develops advanced conceptual understanding of federalism
activities_projects.evaluation: Logical structure and analytical explanation (10 marks)
